item.title: IG is paying up to £3,000 in free shares when you open an account - but there's a big catch
item.author: dailymail.co.uk
item.description: To get the deal you must use the code ZERO3000 when opening your account. You could receive shares in popular US and UK companies such as Unilever, Lloyds and Nvidia, while IG has also added some exchange-traded funds (ETFs) to the list of eligible options. These include WisdomTree Megatrends, Invesco Artificial Intelligence Enablers and Xtrackers Global Infrastructure.
